Recipes

Cooked the Rainbow way.

Restaurant-scale bases and home classics, each built on one Rainbow blend. Premium recipe photography updates are on the way.

Restaurant-scale recipes, not home portions.

Questions professional kitchens ask

25kg per blend for direct HORECA supply. Below that, we route you to the nearest distributor so you get local delivery.

Menu-costing ideas, monthly.

One email a month on standardisation, yields and food-cost control. No spam.
